basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 1 Consultant (Medical) posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum age 40 years and Maximum age upto 70 years
age_limit.details: Minimum age 40 years and Maximum age upto 70 years. Age relaxation for ICMR employees as per the guidelines of ICMR.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or BDS or BVSc or Equivalent degree in relevant subject with at least 12 years of post-qualification experience. OR Retired Government employee with requisite qualification and who were in regular Pay level 10 and above and having at least 10 years of experience in the required specialization.
qualification.details: Consultant (Medical): MBBS or BDS or BVSc or Equivalent degree in relevant subject with at least 12 years of post-qualification experience. Consultant (Medical) - Retired Govt. Servant: Requisite qualification, retired Government employee, who were in regular Pay level 10 and above and having at least 10 years of experience in the required specialization.

salary_details.details: Emoluments: Rs.1,00,000/- for non-retired Govt. servants. For a retired Govt. servant the remuneration shall be fixed in accordance with the Ministry of Finance, Dept. of Expenditure OM No. 3-25/2020-E.IIIA dated 09 Dec 2020.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview and/or a Written test (if number of eligible candidates are more than 30) Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ICMR NITVAR recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Consultant (Medical). This is a project-based role within the National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant (Medical) post. This is a single opening announced by ICMR NITVAR for this specific role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in date for the Consultant (Medical) position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Consultant (Medical) position is scheduled for 08 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the Consultant (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 40 years, and the maximum age limit is up to 70 years for the Consultant (Medical) position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 1,00,000/- for non-retired government servants. For retired government servants, the remuneration is fixed as per Ministry of Finance guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential qualifications required for the Consultant (Medical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS or BDS or BVSc or an equivalent degree in a relevant subject with at least 12 years of post-qualification experience. Retired government employees with specific experience are also eligible.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) in Pune, Maharashtra, with pincode 411026.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original educational documents, experience certificates, photograph, and ID proof, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.
